name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Multi-product consumer lender in Detroit and Atlanta offering loans from $250 to $50,000 — covering cash advances, title loans, installment loans, and personal loans across all credit types.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a brick-and-mortar consumer lending company with at least two physical locations: 3403 Grand River Ave #200 in Detroit, MI and 2197 Cheshire Bridge Rd NE in Atlanta, GA. The company operates extended hours — weekdays 7am to 8pm and weekends 9am to 6pm — suggesting a focus on working-class borrowers who cannot visit during standard banking hours. The brand is straightforward about its positioning: quick access to cash for a broad range of borrowing needs, from small emergency amounts to larger personal loans.

The company offers seven distinct lending products. Cash advances and payday loans serve borrowers needing under $1,000 quickly. Same-day loans promise fast approval with minimal documentation. Installment loans cover the $1,000–$5,000 mid-range for those needing more time to repay. Title loans allow borrowers to use their vehicle as collateral for up to $50,000. Bad credit loans span $250 to $50,000 and are explicitly open to all credit types. Personal loans go up to $50,000 but carry a note that a higher credit score is recommended — the only product on the slate with a credit-quality caveat.

Several features stand out. The application process does not trigger a hard FICO inquiry; instead, the company pulls from a non-traditional consumer reporting agency, which may benefit borrowers protecting their credit score during rate shopping. The company accepts all credit types for the majority of its products, including bad credit borrowers. Extended weekend hours and a walk-in branch model provide an alternative for people who prefer face-to-face lending over fully online processes.

Borrowers should approach with realistic expectations. The website does not disclose interest rates, APRs, or fees anywhere — a significant omission for products that can carry high costs. The disclaimer explicitly states that these loans are designed for short-term financial needs and are not intended as long-term solutions, and recommends that borrowers with ongoing credit problems seek certified credit counseling instead. Approved loan amounts may be lower than the advertised maximums, and qualification is not guaranteed. The combination of payday loans, title loans, and cash advances in a single storefront is a typical profile for high-cost consumer lenders.
address: 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr suite d, Milwaukee, WI 53203

company_info.headquarters: 1042 N Doctor M.L.K. Jr Dr suite d, Milwaukee, WI 53203

pros: Wide loan range from $250 to $50,000 accommodates both small emergency needs and larger borrowing
All credit types accepted on most products — explicitly includes bad credit borrowers
Application does not affect FICO score; uses non-traditional consumer reporting agency
Extended hours including weekends (7am–8pm weekdays, 9am–6pm weekends) for working borrowers
Physical branch locations in Detroit and Atlanta for in-person service
Same-day loans available with fast approval and minimum documentation required
Title loans allow borrowers to access up to $50,000 using vehicle equity without selling the car
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website
Product mix includes payday loans and title loans — product types commonly associated with high-cost borrowing
Approved amounts may be significantly lower than advertised maximums; qualification not guaranteed
Only two known physical locations (Detroit and Atlanta); availability in other states unclear
Personal loans up to $50,000 require a higher credit score, limiting access for the bad-credit borrowers most of their marketing targets
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers who need same-day or next-day cash with bad or thin credit
Vehicle owners in Michigan or Georgia who want to leverage their car title for a larger loan amount
Borrowers who prefer in-person branch visits over fully online lending
Working-class borrowers who need access outside standard 9-to-5 banking hours
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose suits Detroit or Atlanta borrowers who need quick access to funds across a wide range — from a few hundred dollars to $50,000 — and have credit that banks won't approve. The main caveat is that APRs and fees are not disclosed upfront, so borrowers should request full cost details before signing, especially on title loans and payday products which typically carry the highest rates in any lender's portfolio.
services: Title loans (up to $50,000, secured by vehicle)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, higher credit recommended)
In-person branch lending at Detroit and Atlanta locations
Non-traditional credit review (alternative to hard pull)
